subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Khan is earnestly requested to dispatch those documents with all haste, as they are needed for the forthcoming journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب خان البته آن سوادها را بزودی ارسال فرمااید که در سفر باید همراه باشد در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
